0.content:
# 🔒 Active Directory — Account Lockout Source Investigation
Identify the source of account lockouts and pinpoint the device involved. Correlates lockout events (4740) with failed logons (4625) and Kerberos pre-auth failures (4771).

2.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4740")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| summarize event_count = count()

4.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4767")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| summarize event_count = count()

6.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4625")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| summarize event_count = count()

8.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4771")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| summarize event_count = count()

10.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4740") OR matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4767")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| fieldsAdd EventType = if(winlog.eventid == "4740", "Lockout", else: "Unlock")
| makeTimeseries count(), by: EventType, time:{timestamp}, interval:5m

11.content: # Lockout Events — Locked Account & Source Device (4740)

12.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4740")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| parse content, """DATA 'Account That Was Locked Out:' DATA:AccountSID_Name 'Additional Information:' 
DATA 'Caller Computer Name:' DATA:CallerComputer """
| fields timestamp, host.name, AccountSID_Name, CallerComputer
| sort timestamp desc

14.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4740")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| parse content, """DATA 'Account That Was Locked Out:' DATA:AccountSID_Name 'Additional Information:'
DATA 'Caller Computer Name:' DATA:CallerComputer """
| summarize LockoutCount = count(), by:AccountSID_Name
| sort LockoutCount desc

16.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4740")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| parse content, """DATA 'Account That Was Locked Out:' DATA:AccountSID_Name 'Additional Information:'
DATA 'Caller Computer Name:' DATA:CallerComputer """
| summarize LockoutCount = count(), by:CallerComputer
| sort LockoutCount desc

17.content: # Failed Logons by User & Source (Pre-Lockout Activity)

18.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4625")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| parse content, """DATA 'Account Name:' DATA:AccountName 'Account Domain:'
DATA 'Failure Reason:' DATA:FailureReason 'Status'
DATA 'Workstation Name:' DATA:WorkstationName 'Source Network Address:' DATA:SourceIP 'Source Port:'"""
| filterOut contains(AccountName, "$")
| summarize FailCount = count(), by:{AccountName, WorkstationName, SourceIP}
| sort FailCount desc

19.content: # Kerberos Pre-Auth Failures — User & Client IP (4771)

20.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4771")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| parse content, """LD:'logcontent'EOL
LD EOL
LD EOL
LD SPACE LD ':' LD: 'Subject_SecurityID' EOL
LD ':' LD: 'AccountName' EOL
LD EOL
LD EOL
LD EOL
LD EOL
LD EOL
LD '::ffff:' LD: 'RemoteEndpoint' EOL
LD ':' LD: 'RemotePort' EOL"""
| filterOut isNull(AccountName)
| summarize FailCount = count(), by:{AccountName, RemoteEndpoint}
| sort FailCount desc
